# Code of Conduct

## Our Commitment

We are committed to a respectful, inclusive, and constructive community.

## Expected Behavior

- Be respectful in language and feedback.
- Focus on technical content and collaboration.
- Assume good intent and ask clarifying questions before escalating.

## Unacceptable Behavior

- Harassment, discrimination, or hate speech.
- Personal attacks or intimidation.
- Publishing private information without consent.

## Enforcement

The maintainer may remove comments, close threads, block users, or reject contributions that violate this code.

## Reporting

Report conduct concerns privately to the repository maintainer via GitHub profile contact.
